lawyer.explanation: A lawyer protects you if you are accused of a crime
lawyer.rights: You have the right to a lawyer during questioning
lawyer.action: Ask for a lawyer before answering questions

search.explanation: Police need a legal reason or your permission to search
search.rights: You can refuse consent to searches
search.action: Clearly say you do not consent
search.script: I do not consent to searches

silent.explanation: You do not have to answer police questions
silent.rights: You have the right to remain silent
